ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax form */,
  "form_version" TEXT /* Version of the tax form */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the form is effective */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the tax form (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax form (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax bracket */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the bracket belongs to */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the bracket */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the bracket */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the bracket */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Tax year the bracket applies to */,
  "bracket_status" TEXT /* Status of the bracket (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax calculation */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the calculation belongs to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the calculation belongs to */,
  "taxable_income" INTEGER /* Taxable income */,
  "tax_owed" INTEGER /* Tax owed */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the calculation was performed */,
  "calculation_status" TEXT /* Status of the calculation (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_calculations_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax deduction */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the deduction belongs to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the deduction belongs to */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction (e.g., standard, itemized) */,
  "deduction_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the deduction */,
  "deduction_date" TEXT /* Date when the deduction was claimed */,
  "deduction_status" TEXT /* Status of the deduction (e.g., claimed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_deductions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax exemption */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the exemption belongs to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the exemption belongs to */,
  "exemption_type" TEXT /* Type of exemption (e.g., personal, dependent) */,
  "exemption_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the exemption */,
  "exemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the exemption was claimed */,
  "exemption_status" TEXT /* Status of the exemption (e.g., claimed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_exemptions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_tax_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax return */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the return belongs to */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the return belongs to */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Filing status of the return (e.g., single, married) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax return was filed */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax return (e.g., filed, reviewed, accepted) */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the tax return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_tax_returns_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax payment */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax payment */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the tax payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES client_tax_returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax refund */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return the refund belongs to */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax refund */,
  "refund_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the tax refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., check, direct deposit) */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "refund_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_refunds_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES client_tax_returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax audit log */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return the audit log belongs to */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax audit */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the tax audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the audit */,
  "audit_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the auditor who conducted the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_audit_logs_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES client_tax_returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, auditor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., full, limited) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_form_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the tax form */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the tax form version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_form_versions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the import belongs to */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax data import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File name of the tax data import */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the import */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who performed the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_data_imports_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax form the export belongs to */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax data export */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File name of the tax data export */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the export */,
  "exported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who performed the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_data_exports_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id")
)
